name: Rapid Firecannon

passives.name: Energized
passives.effects: Moving and basic attacking generates ''Energize'' stacks, up to 100.

passives.name: Sharpshooter
passives.effects: When fully {{tip|Energized}}, your next basic attack deals {{as|40 '''bonus''' magic damage}} [[on-hit]]. ''Energized'' attacks gain 35% '''bonus''' range, capped at 150.

effects_structured.raw: Moving and basic attacking generates Energize stacks up to 100; basic attacks grant 6 stacks and movement grants 1 stack per 24 units traveled.
At full Energize, your next basic attack deals 40 bonus magic damage on-hit.
Energized attacks gain 35% bonus range, capped at 150.

simpleDescription: Movement builds charges that release a sieging fire attack on release

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: movement and basic attacks build Energize until full charge, then the next basic attack consumes charge to apply Sharpshooter bonus damage and range.
Player-visible behavior: Sharpshooter grants +35% bonus attack range (capped at +150) on the empowered attack and Energized on-hit damage can apply to structures.
